name: Funnel Cakes
recipeIngredient: Powdered sugar and cinnamon -- for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with the milk.
2. Sift together the flour and sugar; add the baking soda and salt.
3. Combine the dry ingredients with the egg-milk mixture until smooth.
4. Hold your finger over the bottom of the funnel, then pour some batter into the funnel.
5. Remove your finger and let the batter drop into hot oil (about 375F), swirling it into concentric circles from the center out.
6. Fry until golden brown, turning once.
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and cinnamon.
